info.name: Source
info.description: Valda's Spire of Secrets: Player Pack

element.name: Valda's Spire of Secrets: Player Pack

description.p: In his extraplanar tower, the devious lich Valda grows his grim collection: heroes of every description from across the multiverse, petrified in marble and arranged by specialty.

Play as a living teddy bear or a musclebound “wizard” in this must-have pack of player options for D&D Beyond. Featuring two unique species, six innovative subclasses, new Chronomancy spells, and a hoard of magic items to bring wit, whimsy, and chaos to your game!
